name: unlockable
description_pt: Metaprogression: desbloqueia conteúdo baseado em condições (achievement, level, currency). Persiste entre sessões. Auto-detecta Achievement, XPLevel e Currency irmãos. Emite unlocked.
description_en: Metaprogression: unlocks content based on conditions (achievement, level, currency). Persists across sessions. Auto-detects sibling Achievement, XPLevel, and Currency. Emits unlocked.

parameters.name: unlocks
parameters.description_pt: Lista de desbloqueios: [{id, name, conditions: [{type: achievement|level|currency, target_id, required}]}].

signals.name: unlocked
signals.description_pt: Emitido quando um conteúdo é desbloqueado.
